name: WILLIE

abilities.name: Demise (Explosive)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, deal 2 damage to models within (X) 2".

abilities.name: Evasive
abilities.text: This model may ignore (X) effects which did not target it.

actions.name: Biting Insult
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: "Here, Hold This!"
triggers.text: The target and models within (t)2" of it must each pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 3 damage.

triggers.name: Even Louder Insults
triggers.text: The target and up to one different enemy model within 2" of the target gain a Stunned token.

actions.name: Blow Charge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (t)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Remove the target after resolving triggers.

triggers.name: Blow it to Hell
triggers.text: Remove all destructible terrain and markers within (t)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: "Clear the Way!"
actions.effects: Place the target within 3" of its current location.

extraction_notes: The (X) in ability text appears to be a placeholder variable, preserved as written
